name: CPE Residency - Unit 1: Foundations of Pastoral Care
descriptionHeading: Welcome to CPE Residency at Bluff City Medical Center
description: Introductory unit for CPE residents covering theology of presence, active listening, verbatim documentation, and the ethics of spiritual care in acute hospital settings. Supervised by Rebecca Price, Board Certified Chaplain.
room: Pastoral Care Office - Bluff City Medical Center

name: CPE Residency - Unit 2: Chaplaincy in Specialized Settings
descriptionHeading: Oncology, ICU, and Palliative Care Chaplaincy
description: Advanced unit exploring spiritual care in oncology, intensive care, and palliative care contexts. Topics include grief ministry, family systems, end-of-life conversations, and interfaith care. Prerequisite: Unit 1.
room: Pastoral Care Office - Bluff City Medical Center

name: Morning Reflections - Show Production Practicum
descriptionHeading: Radio Ministry Production: Morning Reflections with Rebecca
description: Practical workspace for planning and producing Morning Reflections with Rebecca on WGSP 1490 AM. Covers guest coordination, segment scripting, sponsor scheduling, Audacity audio editing basics, and on-air delivery. Managed by Rebecca Price and TJ Jackson.
room: WGSP Beale Street Studio (off-site production only)

name: Grace Community Church - Congregational Care Training
descriptionHeading: Caring for One Another: Lay Pastoral Care Training
description: Training program for lay care volunteers at Grace Community Church. Covers visiting the sick, grief support, active listening, and boundary-keeping in pastoral relationships. Led by Rebecca Price in partnership with Deacon Charles Mosley.

name: CPE Residency - Fall 2025 Cohort (Archived)
descriptionHeading: Fall 2025 CPE Residency - Bluff City Medical Center
description: Archived workspace for the Fall 2025 CPE resident cohort. Retained for reference, evaluation documentation, and competency portfolio review.
room: Pastoral Care Office - Bluff City Medical Center
